items.name: timeline
items.title: Timeline
items.description: A nested, collapsible event timeline with one continuous connector line.

items.name: activity-feed
items.title: Activity Feed
items.description: An avatar-led activity feed with type badges, attachments, date grouping and a live indicator.

items.name: comment-thread
items.title: Comment Thread
items.description: A threaded comment discussion with depth-capped nesting, avatar rows, reactions, replies and collapsible subtrees.

items.name: query-builder
items.title: Query Builder
items.description: A visual, nested AND/OR query builder with a typed field schema and a read-only SQL/JSON live preview with copy.

items.name: json-inspector
items.title: JSON Inspector
items.description: A collapsible, searchable, code-editor-style JSON tree viewer with type coloring, line numbers, match highlighting and per-node path/value copy.

items.name: stat-tile
items.title: Stat Tile
items.description: A KPI stat tile with an animated count-up value, trend delta with semantic coloring (invertable), and a recharts sparkline with gradient fill.

items.name: diff-viewer
items.title: Diff Viewer
items.description: A code-editor-style structural diff viewer for two JSON values, with unified/split toggle, an only-changes filter, type coloring and add/remove/change counts.

items.name: log-stream
items.title: Log Stream
items.description: A live-tail log stream with level filters and counts, message search, auto-scroll with a 'new lines' indicator, and expandable rows for structured detail.

items.name: metric-chart
items.title: Metric Chart
items.description: An observability time-series chart with threshold lines, event annotations, breach shading, and a crosshair tooltip with a click-to-toggle legend.

items.name: trace-waterfall
items.title: Trace Waterfall
items.description: A distributed-trace waterfall: an indented span tree beside time-positioned duration bars, with a time ruler, service colors, error highlighting, collapsible subtrees and hover detail.

items.name: latency-histogram
items.title: Latency Histogram
items.description: A latency distribution histogram with p50/p95/p99 markers, percentile-zone bar coloring, hover bucket counts and a summary stat row; accepts raw samples or pre-bucketed bins.
